The '''''Sunulok''''' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] during the early stage of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It command area was the [[Glory Room]] and its mess was the [[High Chew]].

A modified [[Vua'spar interdictor]], the vessel was quite old when the war began. Its interior was covered in glowing lichen. It was still a force to be reckoned with, particularly its advanced [[dovin basal]]s, which were able to pull the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The ''Falcon'' was almost captured, but [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] released tons of hydrogen into space, which the dovin basals began to absorb. Solo then fired on the hydrogen, turning them into miniature fusion reactors, and overloading the vessel.

The ''Sunulok'' survived Solo's trick and took part in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. Stationed over the [[OboRin Comet Cluster|Obo Rin cometary cluster]], the ''Sunulok'' participated in first attack wave against [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was disabled early in the battle by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|forces]], forcing Lah and the crew to abandon the ship, leaving it for dead.
